allocation_rules.pane6_note: No unallocated generic hard_blocked operation remained after specific-domain allocation; Pane 6 contains future-facing validation debt only.

claims.current_blocker: HARD_BLOCKED_AFTER_WAVE3: subentity/BREP/path operation lacks a bounded handler and evidence contract.
claims.implementation_goal: Reopen `edit.subentity.add_paths` from hard_blocked status and implement only if subentity_brep_solid_path can provide bounded, testable, non-registry-only evidence.
claims.preferred_route: ObjectARX subentity/BREP path handler against a staged DWG
claims.fallback_route: read-only BREP/topology extraction route; keep mutating subentity edits blocked without staged write evidence
expected_files: config/operations.v2.json (status/evidence update only after a real implementation)
subentity/BREP handler and fixture files to be identified during implementation
claims.test_requirement: Add tests that validate path creation/deletion/transform or topology readback on real staged geometry, including negative cases.
claims.evidence_requirement: Capture before/after or readback artifact proving exact subentity path/topology effect, plus gate output.
